name: DIFF_f
description: Differentiator - legacy derivative block using numerical differentiation
xmlExample: <BasicBlock id="..." parent="..." interfaceFunctionName="DIFF_f" blockType="c" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="1" simulationFunctionName="diffblk" simulationFunctionType="OLDBLOCKS" style="DIFF_f"><ScilabString as="exprs" height="2" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/><data line="1" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabString><ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32"><data line="0" column="0" value="0"/></ScilabInteger><ScilabDouble as="state" height="1" width="2"><data line="0" column="0" realPart="0.0"/><data line="0" column="1" realPart="0.0"/></ScilabDouble><mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/></BasicBlock>
anomalies: Uses 'state' instead of 'dState' for buffer in reference
criticalRules: OLDBLOCKS type must be handled correctly in simulation
